# Eagles of the Misty Mountains

> [!danger] ⚔️ Ally · Cost: **4** · Tactics

---

Eagles of the Misty Mountains cannot have restricted attachments. Eagles of the Misty Mountains gets +1 ATK and +1 DEF for each facedown attachment it has.
**Response:** After another **_Eagle_** character leaves play, you may attach that card facedown to Eagles of the Misty Mountains.

**Pack:** [[Return to Mirkwood]] #119
